statistics.note: v10 counted D206+D207 only (438). This extraction covers D205+D206+D207. D206+D207 combined = 258 individual features. Many features here are grouped as feature_sets (e.g. N-008~N-015 = 8 items grouped as 1 feature_set, I-011~I-106 = 96 items grouped as 1). Expanding all grouped feature_sets in D205 alone yields ~170+ individual items (80 entries including ~90 items in grouped sets). Total expandable count across all 3 files exceeds 500 individual implementable items.
